habits.title: Habits
habits.subtitle: Build habits that make you better.
habits.emptyMsg: Tap the + button to create your first habit.
habits.plusLimitBody: Free accounts can track up to 3 custom habits. Unlock Plus for unlimited habits.
habits.plusLockedBody: This habit is locked on the free plan. Unlock Plus to manage unlimited habits.

stats.title: Reflect on your history.
stats.subtitle: Reflection, not repetition.
stats.monthSummary: {{full}} of {{total}} days with all habits completed
stats.monthSummaryEmpty: No days with habits due yet in this month.
stats.plusHint: Free plan shows this week view. Plus adds deeper history views.

profile.title: Profile
profile.localDataDisclaimer: Data is stored locally. Enable iCloud or Google backup to protect your history.
profile.aboutBody: Fajr is a calm companion for Quran and daily habits. It's designed to help you show up with sincerity, offline and in your own rhythm.
profile.aboutCardBody: Fajr is a habit companion built for the Muslim community. Built with intention by Kasrah.
profile.benefit4: Custom themes (free for your first 90 days)
profile.comingSoonPayment: Payment integration will be added in the next update.
profile.privacyMsg: A dedicated privacy policy link will be added in a future update.
profile.resetMsg: This removes habits, logs, and profile from this device.

backupRestore.title: Backup & Restore
backupRestore.backupHelp: Export your habits and history as a JSON file you can save or share.
backupRestore.backupFailedMsg: Something went wrong while creating your backup.
backupRestore.restoreHelp: Import a previously exported Fajr backup file.
backupRestore.notFajr: This doesn't look like a Fajr backup file.
backupRestore.notFajrMsg: Please choose a valid Fajr backup JSON.
backupRestore.confirmMsg: This will replace all your current data with the backup. Continue?
backupRestore.restoreFailedMsg: Something went wrong while restoring your backup.

paywall.heading: Invest in your deen.
paywall.charityIntro: 50% of every Fajr+ subscription goes to
paywall.charityOutro: — may Allah accept it from you and us.
paywall.benefit4: Custom themes (free for your first 90 days)
paywall.legal: Subscriptions renew automatically. Cancel anytime in your device settings. Lifetime purchase is a one-time non-consumable.
paywall.unavailableMsg: This plan is not available right now. Please try again later.
paywall.pendingMsg: We could not confirm your subscription yet. Please try Restore purchases.

addHabit.plusBody: Free accounts can track up to 3 custom habits. Unlock Plus for unlimited habits.

onboarding.title: Fajr
onboarding.tagline: Your daily companion for a life of barakah
onboarding.languageHint: You can change this anytime in Profile.
onboarding.trackBody: Fajr helps you stay build and stay consistent with your habits.
onboarding.sadaqahBody: When you choose to give, you can support the work behind this app and help humanitarian relief reach people in need—both are meaningful ways to put your sadaqah into action.
onboarding.dataDisclaimer: Your data lives on this device. Back up your phone to keep your history safe.

appColors.title: App Colors
appColors.themesPlusAfterGrace: Themes are part of Fajr+ after your first 90 days

devTools.title: Dev Tools
devTools.dateHelp: Set `fajr_dev_date` to override time in the app. Clear the field to disable.
devTools.streakHelp: These actions affect logs only (habits and profile are preserved).
devTools.installDate91: Set install date to 91 days ago
devTools.clearLogsMsg: This clears all logs, but keeps habits and your profile.
devTools.injected7: Added 7 days of completed logs for all habits.
devTools.calendarHint: Tap a day to cycle: all due complete (green dots), then all missed (yellow), then clear. Dots match habits due that day, like the week row above.
devTools.dayActionTitle: Choose an action for this day.
devTools.logsUpdatedShort: Habit logs updated for this day.

notifications.reminderBody: Time for your habit. Small steps, consistently.
notifications.weeklyReportTitle: Your week in review is ready ✦
notifications.weeklyReportBody: See how consistent you've been. Tap to reflect.
notifications.morningBody: You have habits to take care of today. Small steps.
notifications.eveningBody: Have you taken care of today's habits?

weeklyReport.title: Your week in review
weeklyReport.overallHint: Across all due habits in the last 7 days
weeklyReport.upsellTitle: See your full weekly breakdown with Fajr+
weeklyReport.upsellBody: Get habit-by-habit dots, percentages, and your full reflection.

0.text: The most beloved deeds to Allah are those done consistently, even if small.

1.text: Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear — take one step at a time.

3.text: Tie your camel, then trust in Allah.

4.text: The strong believer is better and more beloved to Allah than the weak believer.

5.text: Be mindful of Allah, and you will find Him before you.

6.text: The world is the believer's prison and the disbeliever's paradise.

7.text: Whoever follows a path seeking knowledge, Allah will make easy for him the path to Paradise.

8.text: Let not your heart be attached to what perishes — build for the lasting home.

9.text: Allah is with the patient — keep going with sincerity.
